name: io.github.bezata/kobsidian-mcp
description: Filesystem-first MCP server for Obsidian vaults with an LLM-Wiki layer (notes, links, tags, tasks, Dataview, Canvas, Kanban, Mermaid, Marp, Templates, workspace commands, and wiki.* orchestration).

environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the Obsidian vault this server should operate on.

environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Obsidian Local REST API plugin. Only required for workspace.* and commands.* tools.

environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_REST_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bearer key for the Obsidian Local REST API plugin.
